page.title: Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header/doc

revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header/doc]]</includeonly>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT
revision.text: #redirect[[en:Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header/doc]]</includeonly>

#redirect[[:en:Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header/doc]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of Template:Monarchs by nationality and century category header/doc]]</includeonly>

== Usage == This template is used to categorize Monarchs by nationality and century on category pages. Will produce the correct links and categories for the specific nationality and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == Additional information can be found on the core [[Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header|template]].
== See also == {{Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line -->
[[Category:Occupation category header templates]] [[Category:Monarchs by century]] [[Category:Monarchs by country]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
== Usage == This template is used to categorize Monarchs by nationality and century on category pages. Will produce the correct links and categories for the specific nationality and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == Additional information can be found on the core [[Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header|template]].
== See also == {{Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line -->
[[Category:Occupation category header templates]] [[Category:Monarchs by century]] [[Category:Monarchs by country]] }}</includeonly> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

== Usage == This template is used to categorize Monarchs by nationality and century on category pages. Will produce the correct links and categories for the specific nationality and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == Additional information can be found on the core [[Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header|template]].
== See also == {{Occupation by nationality and century category header/seealso}}
<includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- Categories below this line -->
[[Category:Occupation category header templates]] [[Category:Monarchs by century]] [[Category:Monarchs by country]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "
revision.text:
== Usage == This template is used to categorize Monarchs by nationality and century on category pages. Will produce the correct links and categories for the specific nationality and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == Additional information can be found on the core [[Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header|template]].

[[Category:Occupation category header templates]] [[Category:Monarchs by century]] [[Category:Monarchs by country]] }}</includeonly>

revision.text:
== Usage == This template is used to categorize Monarchs by nationality and century on category pages. Will produce the correct links and categories for the specific nationality and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>

To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>

revision.text:
== Usage == This template is used to categorize Monarchs by nationality and century on category pages. Will produce the correct links and categories for the specific nationality and century referred to in the category page's title.
To include this template on a page, use the following code:
<syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Example == <syntaxhighlight lang="wikitext" inline>{{Monarchs by nationality and century category header}}</syntaxhighlight>
== Notes == Additional information can be found on the core [[Template:Occupation by nationality and century category header|template]].
